steps.t: Amarêkh has asked you to go north to a place called Tilmakhím, the Cross-roads. There the bookseller Ephrâti should have the book A Smouldering Fire f…
Return to Ephrâti the bookseller. Ephrâti can be found in Tilmakhím in Takhdâr.
Return to Amarêkh in Mekab-kuphâr, in southern Khabârkhad, with the book.
